title: NY budget funds sewage line to help Oswego County develop 30,000 acres near Micron
summary: New York State budget legislation has approved funding for a major sewage pipeline infrastructure project across Oswego County designed to enable development of 30,000 acres adjacent to Micron Technology's facility. This state-level infrastructure investment directly impacts regional land-use planning and economic development capacity in Syracuse's broader ecosystem.

political_signal.description: State legislative budget commitment to regional infrastructure supporting Micron Technology corridor development indicates alignment between state priorities and Central New York economic development strategy

processing_notes: Article focuses on state-level action with direct implications for City of Syracuse regional planning context
No direct City budget impact detected but infrastructure enables private/regional development near major employer
Author Mark Weiner is Syracuse.com reporter covering Micron beat; article is from 2026 (future-dated)
